name: Gp Louisiana
description_short: GP Louisiana Federal Credit Union is a locally-based credit union in Zachary, LA offering savings accounts, loans, and financial services to eligible members.
description_long:
GP Louisiana Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Zachary, Louisiana. The credit union operates with a mission to connect members to their financial dreams through local, personalized service. As a federally-chartered credit union, it is regulated and insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA).

The institution offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including savings accounts, auto loans (as low as 4.50% APR), home equity lines of credit (7.00% APR), personal loans (11.00% APR), recreational loans (7.25% APR), VISA credit cards, and online/mobile banking services. Members can access their accounts through online banking, mobile apps, and three physical branch locations across Louisiana. The credit union also participates in the CO-OP Shared Branching network, providing members with access to thousands of surcharge-free ATMs and branches nationwide.

GP Louisiana FCU distinguishes itself through its community-focused approach as a local credit union operating in a specific geographic region. The institution maintains transparent governance with a supervisory committee (Bea Sibley, Sharon Tennent, and Terin Patin) that conducts regular account verifications. The routing number is 265476657, and membership eligibility is based on criteria listed on their website. Customer service is available via phone/text at (225) 654-7230 during business hours.

As a regional credit union, GP Louisiana FCU serves members seeking personal banking relationships with a local institution rather than large national banks. The competitive loan rates and membership-based model provide potential advantages for eligible borrowers. However, membership restrictions and limited branch presence compared to major banks may limit accessibility for those outside the service area.
services: Home equity lines of credit (7.00% APR)
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 4.50% APR
Multiple branch locations in Louisiana (Zachary main branch, Lane branch, and Plaquemine branch) with extended hours
Mobile banking app available for account management anywhere, anytime
Access to thousands of surcharge-free ATMs through CO-OP Shared Branching network nationwide
VISA credit card and debit card options with fraud protection services
Member-owned credit union structure with transparent governance and supervisory committee oversight
Flexible loan products including home equity lines of credit, personal loans, and recreational loans
cons: Membership eligibility restrictions limit access to only those who qualify
Limited geographic footprint with only three branch locations in Louisiana
Higher personal loan rates (11.00% APR minimum) compared to auto loans
No mention of savings account rates or CD offerings on primary website content
Smaller institution with fewer resources and services compared to major national banks
best_for: Louisiana residents in the Zachary and Plaquemine areas seeking local banking relationships
Credit union members eligible for membership looking for competitive auto and recreational loan rates
Borrowers seeking personalized service from a community-focused financial institution
Individuals wanting nationwide ATM access through CO-OP shared branching network
diagnosis: GP Louisiana Federal Credit Union is best suited for Louisiana residents in or near Zachary who qualify for membership and seek competitive loan rates with local, personalized banking service. The main caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted, and the institution's limited branch network may not serve those outside its primary service areas.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
